clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: Provider means TechServ Inc. Client means RetailMax Corp. Services means the IT managed services in Schedule A.

clauses.title: Scope
clauses.text: Provider shall deliver the Services in accordance with the specifications and timelines in Schedule A.

clauses.title: Fees
clauses.text: Client shall pay monthly service fees of $25,000 within thirty (30) days of invoice.

clauses.title: Data Obligations
clauses.text: The Client shall be solely responsible for maintaining backups of all Client data. The Provider assumes no responsibility for Client data loss, corruption, or unauthorized access.

clauses.title: Term
clauses.text: Initial term of three (3) years with automatic annual renewal.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of the State of Texas.

clauses.text: Provider shall deliver the Services in accordance with the specifications and timelines in Schedule A.

version_history.author: Drafter
version_history.change_summary: Provider adds indemnification and comprehensive data protection guarantee.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.text: Provider means TechServ Inc. Client means RetailMax Corp. Services means the IT managed services in Schedule A.

clauses.title: Scope
clauses.text: Provider shall deliver the Services in accordance with the specifications and timelines in Schedule A.

clauses.title: Fees
clauses.text: Client shall pay monthly service fees of $25,000 within thirty (30) days of invoice.

clauses.title: Data Obligations
clauses.text: The Client shall be solely responsible for maintaining backups of all Client data. The Provider assumes no responsibility for Client data loss, corruption, or unauthorized access.

clauses.title: Term
clauses.text: Initial term of three (3) years with automatic annual renewal.

clauses.title: Governing Law
clauses.text: Laws of the State of Texas.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Both parties shall protect confidential information for three (3) years.

clauses.title: SLA
clauses.text: Provider guarantees 99.95% uptime with 4-hour response for P1 issues.

clauses.title: IP Rights
clauses.text: Provider retains all IP in tools and methodologies. Client retains IP in its data and content.

clauses.title: Liability Cap
clauses.text: Total liability capped at fees paid in preceding 12 months.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate with 60 days notice for material breach.

clauses.title: Force Majeure
clauses.text: Neither party liable for force majeure delays.

clauses.title: Indemnification
clauses.text: Provider shall indemnify Client against third-party IP claims.

clauses.title: Provider Data Protection Guarantee
clauses.text: The Provider shall be fully responsible for the security, integrity, backup, and disaster recovery of all Client data at all times. The Provider guarantees zero data loss and shall bear all costs associated with data recovery in the event of any data corruption or loss.
